description: Use Install PyPI package first (venv unifi), then add this server. Command must be the venv binary, not plain unifi-mcp-server (not on PATH in the container). Fill UNIFI_API_KEY and UNIFI_LOCAL_HOST.
package_hint: Admin: use “Install PyPI package” below, or pip install unifi-mcp-server on the proxy host

description: Run an MCP server from npm without global install. Edit the command to use another @scope/package name.
Template for a hosted MCP endpoint using streamable HTTP. Replace the URL with your server.
